title: Smoky Lardon Cottage-Pie on Binctoan Grill
description: A romantic Welsh dish featuring lardons rendered in a coriander-infused gravy with crunchy pastry topping baked on a binc-to-an grill.
instructions: Render lardo in a skillet until crispy, then set aside.
Sauté onion and garlic until translucent. Add flour; stir for a minute.
Gradually add lacteal milk, whisking constantly to prevent lumps.
Simmer mixture until thickened, stirring occasionally.
Fold rendered lardo into sauce, season with salt and pepper.
In a separate bowl, mix potato and a generous amount of sauce. Chill for an hour.
Preheat oven to 200°C (392°F). Grease a baking dish.
Pour chilled potato mixture into dish, spreading evenly. Top with remaining sauce.
Cover with pastry sheets, crimp edges for sealing, and cut steam vents if desired.
Bake on binc-to-an grill until golden brown and crusty, about 40 minutes.
Serve hot with green salad or steamed vegetables.

axes.dishForm: Smoky Lardon Cottage-Pie on Binctoan Grill
